text.title: Competitor Analysis Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Note-taking app positioning
example.note: Category: PKM. Geography: US,DE,GB. Seed list from interviews + Reddit r/PKMS + Product Hunt: 6 direct (Notion, Obsidian, Roam, Logseq, Mem, Anytype), 4 indirect (Apple Notes, Google Docs, Bear, OneNote), 2 future (Cursor + ChatGPT memory). Matrix: Notion premium-broad, Obsidian budget-broad, Roam premium-narrow. Empty quadrant: budget-narrow. Parallel fan-out: 12 Task calls; each pulls pricing + 1-star G2 + Reddit thread. Weaknesses: Notion 'too slow' (n=320), Obsidian 'steep learning curve' (n=180), Roam 'expensive + dated UI'. Gap = experience. Positioning: 'For busy professionals who want fast, simple notes with linking. Unlike Notion, we are single-purpose and lightning fast. Unlike Obsidian, we work great out of the box.'
